tests.name: search/filtering/rules/edgeRules colors edges that match edge-targeted rules by id kind or path
search/filtering/rules/edgeRules leaves edges unchanged when no edge-targeted rule matches
search/filtering/rules/edgeRules treats missing targets as node rules even when the edge fields match
search/filtering/rules/edgeRules matches edge rules by full path and full path with kind
search/filtering/rules/nodeRules drops disabled rules and applies active rules from bottom to top
search/filtering/rules/nodeRules falls back to the default node color when the source node has no color
